data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix operates on a decentralized microservices architecture, allowing for independent development and deployment.
data.technical_spec: Docker containers, AWS for cloud infrastructure, API gateways

data.title: Global Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes a worldwide CDN for rapid content delivery to users regardless of location.
data.technical_spec: Open Connect, edge locations distributed globally

data.title: Scalability
data.description: Architecture designed to handle millions of concurrent users with elastic scaling.

data.title: Resilience and Fault Tolerance
data.description: Built to sustain server failures without affecting user experience.

data.title: Data Storage and Management
data.description: Efficient data handling to store user profiles, watch history, and preferences.
